zh.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙姆爾坡斯托福
zh.Blancminster now Whitchurch, Shropshre,: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾其其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Bewes L de Knoville於大約1252年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Bewes L de Knoville34歲，母親Joan de la Hyde24歲。他於1273年10月與Cecily Joan Waleran在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1307年7月6日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年56歲。

zh-hans.Chepstow, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙姆爾坡斯托福
zh-hans.Blancminster now Whitchurch, Shropshre,: 英国英格兰史洛普爾其其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bewes L de Knoville于大约1252年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Bewes L de Knoville34岁，母亲Joan de la Hyde24岁。他于1273年10月与Cecily Joan Waleran在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1307年7月6日在英国英格兰史洛普爾享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bewes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bews
meanings: Short form of   Elizabeth  , in common use in the days of  Queen Elizabeth I , who was known as ‘Good Queen Bess’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Bewes L de Knoville was born about 1252, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, was 34 and his mother, Joan de la Hyde, was 24. He married Cecily Joan Waleran in October 1273, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 6 July 1307, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bewes L de Knoville est né environ 1252, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan de la Hyde, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Joan Waleran en octobre 1273, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1307, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bewes L de Knoville um 1252 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Bewes L de Knoville 34 und seine Mutter Joan de la Hyde 24. Er hat im Oktober 1273 in London, England Cecily Joan Waleran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Juli 1307 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bewes L de Knoville è nato il circa 1252 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan de la Hyde, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Joan Waleran nel ottobre 1273, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 luglio 1307, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bewes L de Knovilleが約1252年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Bewes L de Knovilleは34歳，母Joan de la Hydeは24歳であった。1273年10月にイギリスロンドンでCecily Joan Waleranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1307年7月6日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bewes L de Knoville(이)가 대략 1252년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Bewes L de Knoville(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de la Hyde(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1273년 10월 영국 런던에서 Cecily Joan Waleran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1307년 7월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Blancminster now Whitchurch, Shropshre,: Whitchurch, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bewes L de Knoville nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan de la Hyde, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Joan Waleran em outubro de 1273, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1307, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bewes L de Knoville родился около 1252 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Bewes L de Knoville было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de la Hyde, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Joan Waleran октябрь 1273 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 июля 1307 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bewes L de Knoville nació aproximadamente 1252, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Bewes L de Knoville, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan de la Hyde, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Cecily Joan Waleran en octubre de 1273, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de julio de 1307, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
